events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need produce exactly one valid JSON object, no prose. We need assess scenario: only photo of equipment bonding is blocked by packaging and glare; visible outline suggests right area but identifying mark and connection details cannot be read. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since evidence insufficient to confirm compliance or identify component/material/condition. Task: identify component/material/condition involved. Can't read from evidence. There is no sound. So decision needs_more_info likely. Risk maybe medium or low? In heavy industrial electrical bonding, inability to verify could be medium risk. But no observed defect. Stage rough-complete. Component conditions none flagged, use empty list. Percent complete maybe 0? Could estimate overall progress unknown 0. Confidence maybe 0.0 because can't identify. References NEC 250.104/250.30. Need JSON fields as per schema.

Let's craft: decision "needs_more_info", risk "medium", work_stage "rough-complete", component_conditions [], percent_complete 0, value 0, sound_source "", event_time 0.0, rate 0.0, order [], workable [], findings ["Photo is obstructed by packaging and glare; identifying mark and bonding connection details cannot be verified"], actions ["Obtain a clear, unobstructed photo of the equipment bonding connection and identifying marks; verify continuity and compliance per NEC 250.104/250.30 before close-out"], rationale "Insufficient visual evidence to identify or assess the equipment bonding component; cannot confirm code compliance without readable details.", references ["NEC 250.104", "NEC 250.30"].

Check required: sound_source maybe component or source of sound when asked; not asked. Could leave "". Order empty list. Workable empty. Ensure valid JSON raw, no markdown.
